description_long: This is an adult pedestrian with a slender build, visible from the knees down. The person is wearing athletic shoes with a robust sole and a high-ankle design, suitable for walking or running in urban environments. The legs are bare, indicating the person is likely wearing shorts or a skirt, though the upper body is not visible in these views. The shoes have a modern, sporty appearance with a combination of synthetic and textile materials. The stance is upright and relaxed, suggesting the person is standing still. The overall appearance is casual and appropriate for outdoor activities or everyday urban movement.
description: An adult pedestrian with bare legs and athletic shoes, standing upright. The footwear is sporty and robust, suitable for urban walking.
description_view_0: Front view showing both legs and the front of the athletic shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the left shoe and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the legs and heels of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the profile of the right shoe and leg.
